allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: arXiv Radar v0.1.0 with Jidoka resolution flow fixes

Core bug fixes:
- Fix Jidoka resolution flow: Pipeline now respects human override decisions
- Fix PAPER_ARCHIVED: Remove from incoming_papers \(was causing infinite loops\)
- Fix POLL_COMPLETE guard: Don''t block all papers on single Jidoka trigger
- Fix checkPaperJidoka: Trust existing matched_topics to prevent re-triggering

Architectural improvements:
- Jidoka fires correctly on conflicting evidence \(nervous system\)
- Kaizen proposes options and records decision \(proposal layer\)
- Classifier respects human governance decisions \(execution layer\)
- Human override via applyHumanResolution\(\) helper

Test suite:
- Add Playwright E2E tests for Jidoka resolution flow
- Add tests for UI bug fixes \(BUG-002 through BUG-010\)
- All 11 tests passing

Files modified:
- src/hooks/useAutonomaton.ts \(human override check + helper\)
- src/state/reducer.ts \(PAPER_ARCHIVED fix\)
- src/lib/transitionGuards.ts \(POLL_COMPLETE + checkPaperJidoka fixes\)
- tests/e2e/jidoka-resolution.spec.ts \(new\)
- playwright.config.ts \(new\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
